name: @opengsd/gsd-core
description: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.
author: OpenGSD

scripts.build: npm run generate:identity && npm run build:lib && npm run gen:plugin-skills && npm run gen:loop-host-contract && npm run gen:capability-registry && npm run build:hooks
scripts.version: node scripts/sync-manifest-versions.cjs --stage && node scripts/gen-capability-registry.cjs --write && git add gsd-core/bin/lib/capability-registry.cjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build:lib && npm run build:hooks
scripts.pretest: npm run build:lib && npm run lint:skill-deps
scripts.pretest:coverage: npm run build:lib && npm run lint:skill-deps
scripts.lint:ci: npm run lint && npm run lint:skill-deps && npm run lint:generated-sync && node scripts/lint-test-file-count.cjs && node scripts/lint-command-contract.cjs && node scripts/lint-pr-check-project-dir.cjs && npm run lint:legacy-name && node scripts/lint-regression-test-names.cjs && node scripts/lint-allow-test-rule-refs.cjs && node scripts/lint-resolution-provenance.cjs && node scripts/validate-registry.cjs && node scripts/lint-table-schema-drift.cjs
scripts.lint:generated-sync: node scripts/gen-capability-registry.cjs --check && node scripts/gen-loop-host-contract.cjs --check && node scripts/gen-capability-matrix.cjs --check && node scripts/sync-manifest-versions.cjs --check && node scripts/gen-inventory-manifest.cjs --check && node scripts/generate-package-identity.cjs --check && node scripts/gen-plugin-skills.cjs --check && node scripts/gen-registry.cjs --check
scripts.test:coverage:unit: c8 --check-coverage --lines 70 --branches 60 --reporter text --include 'gsd-core/bin/lib/*.cjs' --exclude 'tests/**' --all node scripts/run-tests.cjs --suite unit && c8 check-coverage --per-file --lines 0 --functions 0 --statements 0 --branches 70 --include 'gsd-core/bin/lib/state.cjs' --include 'gsd-core/bin/lib/phase.cjs' --include 'gsd-core/bin/lib/verify.cjs' --include 'gsd-core/bin/lib/init.cjs' --exclude 'tests/**'
